creator: maciej@pasternacki.net
text:
Could not find a way to do that other than patch CMake macros: the "INSTALL_MAN ("tap.3" 3)" macro expands in cmake/Shlomif_Common.cmake to "INSTALL(FILES ${SOURCE} DESTINATION "share/man/man${SECTION}")".

It's the same problem with static library removal: CMake macros seem to build specifically the shared lib, without any configurability, so building and installing libtap.a would require changing CMake macros.
